testcase.name: Search for a product on an e-commerce website

testcase.system-out: Given I open the browser and navigate to "https://www.google.com"...........passed When I search for "laptop" in the search box................................failed And I click on the first search result......................................skipped Then I should see product details displayed.................................skipped And I take a screenshot of the product page.................................skipped
